commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer selection between this contributor branch and the overlapping bot branch, plus acceptance of the 2s drain cap; there is no narrow automated repair left.; Cleared: The diff changes CLI shutdown behavior and integration tests only; I found no concrete security or supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes CLI forced-exit shutdown to flush stdout and stderr with a bounded timeout and adds POSIX integration tests for large pipe output, stalled readers, and early-closing consumers.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and contributor proof: current main emits large JSON with console.log and then force-exits after 50 ms without a stdio drain wait. I did not run the live pipe test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer selection between this contributor branch and the overlapping bot branch, plus acceptance of the 2s drain cap; there is no narrow automated repair left.
